jsonld.name: Chicago
jsonld.description: Additional InformationMastro’s Steakhouse Chicago is centrally located in the vibrant River North neighborhood, steps away from the iconic Magnificent Mile. As an OpenTable Diners’ Choice winner for 2025, Mastro’s Chicago continues to be a top destination for unforgettable dining surrounded by renowned art galleries, upscale boutiques, and bustling nightlife.Nightly Live EntertainmentMastro’s offers nightly live entertainment to elevate your dining experience. Enjoy an inviting atmosphere enhanced by top local musicians performing every evening.Sunday - Thursday: 6:00 PM - 10:00 PMFriday - Saturday: 6:30 PM - 10:30 PMSocial HourUnwind in style during our Chicago‑exclusive daily happy hour, available only at our Chicago location from 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM in our lounge area.Menus Dress Code

jsonld.name: Columbus
jsonld.description: NOW OPENAs an OpenTable Diners’ Choice winner for 2025, Mastro’s Steakhouse Columbus is elegantly located at Easton Town Center, bringing an unmatched dining experience to this shopping and entertainment destination. Mastro's is the perfect place to indulge in world-class cuisine, award-winning wines, and celebrate life's finest moments. Whether you're enjoying a special night out or a business dinner, Mastro's promises an unforgettable experience.Nightly Live EntertainmentMastro’s offers nightly live entertainment to elevate your dining experience. Enjoy an inviting atmosphere enhanced by top local musicians performing every evening.Social HourUnwind in style during our Monday – Friday happy hour, available from 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM only in our bar & lounge area.Menus Dress Code
